title: Thrive Themes 10.8.8
summary:
Thrive Architect: Expandable Right Sidebar: The right sidebar now has an expanded view that shows text labels alongside icons, making tools easier to find at a glance. Your preference is saved automatically, so the sidebar stays the way you like it every time you open it

Thrive Architect: Cleaner Post List Excerpts: Excerpts in the Post List element display with correct spacing between words and sentences, regardless of how the source content is formatted

Thrive Architect: Localized Date Picker: Date picker fields in your forms automatically display month and day names in your site’s language. No extra configuration needed — if your WordPress site is set to German, visitors see “Januar” and “Montag” instead of English

Thrive Leads: Correct Product Name in Expanded Sidebar: The expanded right sidebar correctly shows the product name — Thrive Leads, Quiz Builder, or Ultimatum — instead of your site’s URL when editing those forms and designs

Thrive Leads: State Controls Always Visible: The state selector and state management controls stay fully accessible when the right sidebar is expanded, with no overlap or hidden elements

Thrive Leads: One-Click Duplication: You can now duplicate Lead Groups, Form Types, Lead Shortcodes, and ThriveBoxes in a single click. All variations and child states are copied automatically

Thrive Quiz Builder: Correct Product Name in Expanded Sidebar: The expanded right sidebar correctly shows the product name — Thrive Leads, Quiz Builder, or Ultimatum — instead of your site’s URL when editing those forms and designs

Thrive Quiz Builder: State Controls Always Visible: The state selector and state management controls stay fully accessible when the right sidebar is expanded, with no overlap or hidden elements

Thrive Quiz Builder: Faster Quiz Submissions: Quiz submissions are processed faster and more reliably, especially for quizzes with many questions or high traffic volumes

Thrive Quiz Builder: Faster Quizzes Page Load: The Quizzes page loads significantly faster. Usage statistics load in the background so the page is ready to use right away

Thrive Quiz Builder: Detailed Quiz Result Breakdowns: Personality quizzes can now display individual category scores, percentages, and a full category list — with customizable sorting so visitors see results in the most meaningful order

Thrive Quiz Builder: Export Quiz Responses: A new Export Results button in the Quiz Builder Users report lets you download all quiz submission data as a CSV file. Large exports run in the background while you keep working. You can also insert quiz result data — scores, category names, and percentages — directly into your pages using a visual shortcode picker in Thrive Architect

Thrive Apprentice: Expanded Sidebar Opens by Default: The right sidebar now opens in expanded mode by default, and the Thrive Optimize “Create New Test” button displays its label correctly when the sidebar is expanded

Thrive Apprentice: Accurate Notification Counter: The notification counter shows the correct number of active notifications and disappears when there are none — no more “99+” showing on an empty inbox

Thrive Apprentice: Faster Courses Page Load: The Courses page loads significantly faster. Enrollment statistics load in the background so the page is ready to use right away

Thrive Dashboard: Expanded Amazon SES Region Support: Amazon SES connections now display clear, helpful error messages when something goes wrong. Support has also been added for 18 additional sending regions, including US-East-2 (Ohio), multiple European locations (London, Paris, Stockholm, Milan), and Asia Pacific regions (Mumbai, Singapore, Sydney, Tokyo, Seoul, Osaka, Jakarta)

Thrive Ultimatum: Correct Product Name in Expanded Sidebar: The expanded right sidebar correctly shows the product name — Thrive Leads, Quiz Builder, or Ultimatum — instead of your site’s URL when editing those forms and designs

Thrive Ultimatum: State Controls Always Visible: The state selector and state management controls stay fully accessible when the right sidebar is expanded, with no overlap or hidden elements

title: Thrive Themes 10.8.7
summary:
Thrive Architect: Post list sticky posts handling: Fixed an error that occurred when using post lists in Thrive Architect on PHP 8.2+ environments

Thrive Architect: Include sticky header height if present to the offset calculation: When clicking on jumplinks or table of contents items, content now properly scrolls into view below the sticky header instead of being hidden behind it

Thrive Leads: Impression tracking to count only when forms are visible: Improved impression tracking accuracy for Thrive Leads forms. Impressions are now counted only when forms actually become visible to users, not on page load. This provides more accurate conversion rate data, especially for trigger-based forms (lightbox, slide-in, ribbon, screen filler) and forms placed below the fold

Thrive Leads: Create-tag UI in Select2 dropdown: Improved the tag creation experience in lead generation forms with a redesigned interface. The create-tag button is now positioned in a dedicated section for easier access, and you can quickly create new tags by pressing Enter

Thrive Apprentice: New Course Welcome Email template with per-course toggle: New “Course Welcome Email” feature allows you to automatically send personalized welcome emails when students gain access to your courses. Each course has an individual toggle to enable/disable this feature, and the new `[course_url]` shortcode is now available in all email templates

Thrive Theme Builder: Improved ConvertKit compatibility: Resolved a conflict that could occur when running multiple Thrive products with ConvertKit, connected, ensuring seamless integration across your Thrive suite

Thrive Dashboard: Duplicate subscriber errors for MailPoet, AWeber, Constant Contact V3, and Sendy: Fixed an issue where existing subscribers would see error messages when submitting lead generation forms connected to MailPoet, AWeber, Constant Contact V3, or Sendy

Thrive Dashboard: Error in ActiveCampaign integration: Fixed a critical PHP 8+ compatibility issue in the ActiveCampaign integration that caused errors when API responses were empty

Thrive Product Manager: Improved PHP 8.2 compatibility: Resolved an issue that could cause errors during license verification in Thrive Product Manager on newer PHP versions

Thrive Ultimatum: Implement viewport-based impression tracking: Improved impression tracking accuracy for Thrive Ultimatum widgets/shortcodes, Thrive Leads forms, and Thrive Quiz Builder splash pages. Impressions are now only counted when elements are actually visible to users (50% viewport visibility), ensuring more accurate analytics and A/B testing data

Uncategorized: AWeber connection reliability: Fixed an issue where reconnecting your AWeber account could fail if the authentication token hadexpired, requiring a fresh login

title: Thrive Themes 10.8.5
summary:
What’s New:: Advanced Tag Management: You can now create, select, and manage tags directly within Thrive Architect for supported platforms. No need to switch back and forth between your email service provider and WordPress!

What’s New:: Enhanced Custom Field Mapping: Map your form fields to custom fields in your email service provider, giving you more control over the data you collect and how it’s organized in your marketing platform

What’s New:: *Improved Platform Support: We’ve added enhanced integration capabilities including tag synching for:

ActiveCampaign

What’s New:: AWeber (now supports migration to OAuth2 authentication)

What’s New:: ConvertKit (Kit)

What’s New:: Constant Contact

What’s New:: FluentCRM

What’s New:: Keap (Infusionsoft)

What’s New:: KlickTipp

What’s New:: Mailchimp

What’s New:: MailRelay

What’s New:: SendLane

What’s New:: Zoho Campaigns

What’s New:: Better Performance: We’ve added intelligent caching for API requests, reducing redundant calls and speeding up your workflow when configuring forms!

What’s New:: Refined User Interface: Tag dropdowns now feature improved styling, better scrollbars, and cleaner selection rendering. Already-selected tags are automatically hidden from the dropdown for a cleaner experience!

What’s New:: Social Share Preview Images Now Display Correctly on Twitter/X: We’ve updated share URL generation to ensure Twitter’s crawler properly caches your quiz badge images, so they now display reliably when shared!

What’s New:: Shop Element Pagination Now Works Properly in Quiz Results: We’ve rebuilt the pagination system to work smoothly with dynamically loaded content. Products now load correctly and all buttons work as expected!

What’s New:: Custom HTML Element Preview in Dynamic Content: Custom HTML elements inside Dynamic Content now properly display their “No preview available” placeholder in the editor, even when switching between different dynamic content states

What’s New:: PHP 8.3 Compatibility for Quiz Settings: Enhanced quiz settings handling to ensure seamless compatibility with PHP 8.3. Quiz pages now load and edit smoothly regardless of your PHP version!

What’s New:: Fixed Error with Questions Missing Answers: Quiz calculations no longer crash when a question has no answers defined. The system now handles empty answer arrays gracefully, preventing fatal errors when calculating quiz scores!

What’s New:: AWeber Now Supports OAuth 2.0 Authentication with Full Tags Management: You can now select, create, and manage AWeber tags directly within Thrive Architect when using OAuth 2.0 connections. OAuth 1.0 connections continue to work as before, and API credentials are now managed via wp-config.php for improved security

What’s New:: Pages with Carousel Elements Now Save Correctly: We’ve added backward compatibility to automatically detect and fix broken carousel configurations when pages load, so everything saves smoothly now!

What’s New:: SureCart Cart Menu Icon Now Works on Landing Pages: We’ve added the necessary initialization so the cart icon now functions properly and opens the cart drawer as expected!

What’s New:: Image Gallery Manual Height Adjustments Now Work Correctly: We’ve rebuilt height handling using CSS variables that automatically adapt to each viewport, so custom heights now work as expected across all devices!

What’s New:: Sticky Elements Now Respect Alignment Settings: Sticky elements now maintain their configured horizontal alignment (left, center, or right) when scrolling. Previously, all sticky elements would center themselves regardless of your alignment settings!

What’s New:: Image Gallery Captions Now Sync with WordPress Media Library: When you update image captions in the WordPress Media Library, those changes now automatically reflect in your Thrive Architect Image Gallery elements. Previously, galleries would continue showing old captions even after updating them in the media library. This applies to all image gallery displays including lightboxes and carousels!

What’s New:: Fixed PHP Warnings in Square Payment Integration: We’ve added proper null checking for token expiration data to resolve PHP warnings in error logs!

What’s New:: Fixed Conflict with Brevo Plugin: If you had the Brevo plugin installed, it was causing design elements in Thrive Apprentice to break due to conflicting Select2 library versions. We’ve updated Thrive Apprentice to prevent this conflict, so your course designs now display correctly!

What’s New:: Author Image No Longer Affects Image Gallery Images in Post Lists: We’ve updated the code to only modify the specific Author Image being inserted, leaving your Image Gallery images untouched!

What’s New:: ThriveBox Impressions Now Track More Accurately: Impressions are now only counted when the ThriveBox is actually opened and viewed, giving you more accurate tracking data!

What’s New:: ActiveCampaign Forms Handle Datetime Fields Correctly: Form submissions to ActiveCampaign no longer fail when updating contacts with empty or invalid datetime field values. The integration now automatically sanitizes datetime fields by removing empty values or formatting them to the correct ISO 8601 format!

What’s New:: Constant Contact and iContact Forms Handle Apostrophes Correctly: Form submissions to Constant Contact and iContact now properly handle apostrophes and special characters without adding unwanted backslashes. Your subscriber data is now stored cleanly in your accounts!

What’s New:: All Mailing Lists and Custom Fields Now Load in Forms: We’ve increased the query limit from 20 to 200 when loading mailing lists and custom fields. If you have more than 20 lists or custom fields in your email service provider, they’ll now all appear in the dropdowns instead of being cut off!

What’s New:: Constant Contact Expired Tokens Now Handled Gracefully: Pages with Lead Generation forms connected to Constant Contact no longer display fatal errors when the refresh token expires. The integration now handles expired tokens properly, allowing your page to load normally so you can reconnect your account!

What’s New:: Google Fonts Now Load Correctly on Subdirectory Sites: Google Fonts can now be properly fetched in the font library for WordPress installations using subdirectory configurations with plain text permalink structures. Previously, these sites would encounter errors when trying to load Google Fonts!

What’s New:: Automator No Longer Installs When Selecting All Products: When using the “Select All” option in Thrive Product Manager, Thrive Automator will now correctly remain unchecked and won’t be installed. This ensures you have full control over which products are installed on your site!
